summary: Tested Eko Bill Payments backend APIs and frontend UI. Backend APIs working correctly. Frontend shows Bill Payments page with service selection, payment modes, and charge breakdown. Issue: Provider loading spinner persists when Eko API times out instead of showing fallback billers.

minor.issue: Eko API times out due to IP whitelisting. Returns fallback billers but endpoint takes >30 seconds
minor.priority: EXPECTED - IP whitelisting issue in preview environment

ui_bugs.issue: Loading spinner persists when Eko billers API times out. Fallback static billers should be shown but loading state stays visible

action_items: Fix EkoLivePayment component to properly show static fallback billers when Eko API times out. Currently shows loading spinner indefinitely.
Consider adding a timeout for the billers API call with automatic fallback to static billers after 5-10 seconds

success_rate.frontend: 80% - Core UI elements working, provider fallback issue

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing test user
context_for_next_testing_agent: Eko Bill Payments testing iteration 82. Backend APIs tested: /api/eko/config (PASS), /api/eko/bbps/categories (PASS), /api/eko/balance (PASS). Frontend Bill Payments page loads correctly with service type selection (Mobile, DTH, Electricity, Credit Card, EMI), payment mode tabs (Instant Pay, Request Based), and PRC balance display. ISSUE FOUND: EkoLivePayment component shows persistent loading spinner when billers API times out. The fallback static billers (defined in getStaticBillers function) are not being displayed because the loading state is not properly handled when API fails. Test user testmember@paras.com / PIN: 123456 works correctly.

features_verified.bill_payments_page: PASS - Loads with service selection, payment modes, charge breakdown
features_verified.service_selection: PASS - Mobile, DTH, Electricity, Credit Card, EMI buttons clickable
features_verified.payment_mode_tabs: PASS - Instant Pay and Request Based tabs visible
features_verified.charge_breakdown: PASS - Shows processing fee + 20% admin charge when amount entered
features_verified.provider_selection: FAIL - Loading spinner persists instead of showing fallback billers
